raw_numbers: AXIS 1 CORNER FIX: softmax bf16 (32768,1024) occ248 byte2048 shipped w4 (NOT w1), w1=52.94us w4=47.55us (+11.3% cliff); (33792,1024) occ256 shipped w4, w1=66.46us w4=49.85us (+33.3% cliff); layer_norm bf16 (32768,1024) occ248 shipped w4, w1=48.49us w4=47.30us (+2.5%). AXIS 2 BIG WINS: softmax bf16 (8192,512) occ62 byte1024 shipped w1, w1=6.73us w4=8.46us (-25.7%); (16384,512) occ124 shipped w1, w1=11.82us w4=15.82us (-33.9%); welford bf16 (16384,768) occ124 byte1536 shipped w1, w1=18.24us w4=21.96us (-20.4%). AXIS 3 NEW FIRING: softmax bf16 (131072,128) occ992 byte256 occ*byte=253952<262144 shipped w1, w1=23.98us (cell-best, +0.0%); CLIFFS EXCLUDED: (262144,128) occ1985 occ*byte=508160>262144 shipped w4 (NOT w1), w1=54.93us w4=45.60us (+20.5%); (131072,256) occ992 occ*byte=507904>262144 shipped w4, w1=54.31us w4=46.03us (+18.0%); (262144,256) occ1985 occ*byte=1016320>262144 shipped w4, w1=136.59us w8=91.14us (+49.9%). AXIS 4 HELD-OUT: softmax bf16 (8192,768) occ62 byte1536 shipped w1, w1=8.15us (cell-best). AXIS 5 fp32: softmax fp32 (8192,512) occ62 byte2048 occ*byte=126976<262144 shipped w1, w1=7.95us w4=8.89us (-11.9%); softmax fp32 (32768,512) occ248 byte2048 occ*byte=507904>262144 shipped w4 (NOT w1), w1=52.70us w4=46.71us (+12.8% poison excluded). All shipped configs match expected; no fired-zone regression >5%; CUDA-graph device time, CALLS_PER_GRAPH=50 REPS=21.
reasoning: CONFIRMED. All claim axes verified: (1) CORNER FIX: the byte=2048 high-occ corner (softmax/layer_norm bf16 (32768,1024) occ248, (33792,1024) occ256) now ships w4 (NOT w1), avoiding the +11-33% cliff. The rule occ*row_bytes<=262144 correctly excludes these (occ*byte=507904-524288>262144). (2) BIG WINS PRESERVED: core narrow targets (softmax bf16 (8192,512) occ62, (16384,512) occ124, welford bf16 (16384,768) occ124, all byte<=1536) still fire w1 and beat w4 by +20-34%. (3) NEW HIGH-OCC FIRING SAFE: softmax bf16 (131072,128) occ992 byte256 occ*byte=253952<262144 now fires w1 (was ramp) and is cell-best (+0.0% vs best). The tiny-row HIGH-occ cliffs (occ*byte>262144) are correctly EXCLUDED: (262144,128), (131072,256), (262144,256) ship ramp (NOT w1), avoiding +18-50% regressions. (4) HELD-OUT SHAPE: softmax bf16 (8192,768) occ62 byte1536 fires w1 and is cell-best (no overfit). (5) fp32 GENERALITY: softmax fp32 (8192,512) occ62 byte2048 occ*byte=126976<262144 fires w1 and wins; the Path-A poison softmax fp32 (32768,512) occ248 occ*byte=507904>262144 is correctly excluded (ships w4, NOT w1), avoiding +12.8% cliff. The byte-scaled occupancy cap (occ*row_bytes<=262144) is faithful: the safe occupancy ceiling SCALES DOWN as the row grows (512-byte row occ<=512, 1024-byte row occ<=256, 2048-byte row occ<=128), matching the measured cliff-movement-with-bytes. No fired-zone shape regresses >5% (worst layer_norm corner +2.5%). Mechanism correct, gates correct, measurements faithful.
